violations.text: Cheese stick snack items were observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit in the counter mounted mini fridge unit next to the coffee maker area. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cheese items m oved to the walk-in cooler for proper cold holding at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The base of the door to the outside, located in the backroom area, is not tight-fitting (gap observed at lower left corner). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
Several food items were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2026

The counter mounted mini fridge was observed at 44 degrees Fahrenheit and to be maintaining food (Cheese stick snacks) temperatures at 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit is to be adjusted and monitored for proper cold holding temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

A hose is connected to the faucet at the mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Several light shields in the establishment were observed with an accumulation of debris and old dead bugs. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Protective shielding is not provided for a couple light fixtures in the store. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Per the PIC, the light shield(s) cracked and were removed and are in need of replacement. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
The hand-washing sink in the employee bathroom was lacking paper towels. Paper towels provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Various food items throughout the facility were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Establishment was observed to have areas of cluttered items creating possible harborage conditions within the store. Food and nonfood items are to be stored in a way to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The establishment is lacking a hand-washing sink for use at the 3 Bay Sink area. A hand sink is to be installed for use at the e 3 bay sink for washing hands after cleaning and sanitizing coffee equipment. Sale of coffee is to be discontinued until hand sink is installed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The hand-washing sink in the employee bathroom was lacking paper towels. Paper towels supplied at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution used for the coffee equipment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
Surfaces next to and behind the 3 bay sink are observed have exposed wood. Wood is to be covered/sealed to be non-absorbent and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
